reason: Browser use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, captured the page title, and returned the expected response mentioning "Example Domain".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface and list of agents displayed.
Found "QA-20260519-013940-ng2b" agent in the sidebar under "Your Agents" section - Agent was visible in the list.
Clicked on the "QA-20260519-013940-ng2b" agent - Agent details page opened with chat interface, input field, and configuration panels visible.
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat input field - Message was entered correctly.
Clicked the "Send message" button - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and a "Browser Navigation to Example Site" task appeared in the sidebar.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent completed processing within 13 seconds and returned a full response.

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." with all tool execution steps visible (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser all marked as completed).
Took screenshot of the final response - Screenshot captured showing complete agent response with all tool calls and the message mentioning "Example Domain".
